title: PsiJoint
description: PsiJoint: A Psi value representing the linear joint thermal transmittance in W/m2 along the centerline of a frame edge.

PsiValue.description: The Psi value for the frame edge.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
